{
  "judge_id": "JG-007",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.5", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.5": 4, "R1.7": 2, "RX.1": 4, "RX.3": 5, "RX.4": 4, "RX.5": 4},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The agent provided a detailed change log that outlines the structural reorganization performed, though no actual reordering or section planning was done.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flagged several instances of overstatement and editorializing in the text but did not audit every citation or reference.",
    "RX.1": "The agent disclosed its uncertainty about certain claims and provided caveats for further verification, which is appropriate.",
    "RX.3": "The agent explicitly noted that no content was added or removed beyond sentence-level edits, indicating adherence to scope.",
    "RX.4": "While the agent did not introduce new errors or harmful content, it did soften some phrasings that overstate the evidence provided in the original text.",
    "RX.5": "The agent provided a detailed change log and caveats for each edit, tracing changes with sufficient precision."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.5": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.5: The agent provided a detailed change log that outlines the structural reorganization performed, though no actual reordering or section planning was done.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flagged several instances of overstatement and editorializing in the text but did not audit every citation or reference.
rationale.RX.1: The agent disclosed its uncertainty about certain claims and provided caveats for further verification, which is appropriate.
rationale.RX.3: The agent explicitly noted that no content was added or removed beyond sentence-level edits, indicating adherence to scope.
rationale.RX.4: While the agent did not introduce new errors or harmful content, it did soften some phrasings that overstate the evidence provided in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provided a detailed change log and caveats for each edit, tracing changes with sufficient precision.
